# Dhanesh Mekalthuru

> Dhanesh Mekalthuru (also known online as Erix or erix.dhanesh) is a full-stack developer, automation engineer, and entrepreneur based in Andhra Pradesh, India. He is the founder and CEO of ECODrIx, a unified business infrastructure platform, and the architect of the ERIX product suite — including ERIX-CRM, ERIX-FLOW, ERIX-LAIE, ErixStore, and Relay Fabric.

This is the personal portfolio of Dhanesh Mekalthuru. The company website is at https://ecodrix.com. The canonical founder profile lives at https://ecodrix.com/founder.

## Identity

- [Portfolio home](https://portfolio.ecodrix.com): Projects, services, process, FAQ, contact.
- [Founder profile on company site](https://ecodrix.com/founder): Canonical entity page with FAQ and roles.
- [LinkedIn — primary](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dhanesh-ecodrix/): Professional profile.
- [LinkedIn — alternate](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dhanesh-mekalthuru-5baa9323b): Older legacy profile.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/dhanesh1232): Public code, open source contributions.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/erix.dhanesh/): Build-in-public posts.

## Companies & brands

- [ECODrIx](https://ecodrix.com): Unified business infrastructure platform, founded March 2024.
- [ERIX brand index](https://ecodrix.com/brands): All five ERIX subsystems and what each does.
- [ERIX-CRM](https://ecodrix.com/platform/crm): Sales pipeline, lead scoring, client portal.
- [ERIX-FLOW](https://ecodrix.com/platform/automation): Visual workflow automation engine.
- [ERIX-LAIE](https://ecodrix.com/platform/lead-intelligence): B2B lead intelligence and enrichment.
- [ErixStore](https://ecodrix.com/platform/erixstore): Proprietary in-memory database server.
- [Relay Fabric](https://ecodrix.com/platform/relay-fabric): Distributed worker engine.

## Services offered

- [Full-stack web development](https://portfolio.ecodrix.com/#services): Next.js apps with Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB backends.
- [SaaS MVP development](https://portfolio.ecodrix.com/#services): Multi-tenant architectures from concept to deployment.
- [AI & workflow automation](https://portfolio.ecodrix.com/#services): n8n flows, Claude/Gemini agents, custom node systems.
- [Growth engineering](https://portfolio.ecodrix.com/#services): SEO, Meta and Google ad pipelines, lead funnels, conversion tracking.
